parsed_output.justification: During the night, only two players declared their roles: Paul clearly stated he was the Seer and Justin claimed he was the Trouble‑Maker.  Mitchell also confessed he started as a Seer.  These three are therefore on the Village side.  Laura’s and James’s opening remarks contain no role claim and suggest potential concealment; the conversation frequently points toward Laura as the suspect.  Consequently, Laura is the strongest candidate to be or have become a Werewolf.
